message.entry: Number of colors must equal number of vertices
Number of colors must equal number of vertices or faces
Number of alpha values must equal number of vertices
Number of alpha values must equal number of vertices or faces
This color style isn't implemented yet
Could not interpolate facecolor for new vertex
Could not interpolate vertexnormal for new vertex
number of colors must be equal to number of vertices when MarkerFaceColor is Flat
value was empty, number of colors must be equal to number of vertices, when MarkerFaceColor is Flat
Values in Faces must lie within the range, 1 and number of vertices
FaceVertexAlphaData must be specified when FaceAlpha is flat or interp
Flat or interp true alpha is not supported when the FaceColor is interp indexed
Size of VertexNormals must be equal to the size of Vertices when lighting mode used is Gouraud
VertexNormals cannot be an empty array when lighting mode used is Gouraud
Size of FaceNormals must be equal to the size of Faces when lighting mode used is Flat
FaceNormals cannot be specified as an empty array when lighting mode used is Flat
